with soul.

A vertical feed of underground music reviews. Cue the exact moment. Follow the ears you trust. Discover what the algorithm buries.

From the feed

Reviews that hit different

B
@bassline_archivistDub Techno
♫Shackleton — Blood On My Hands

The kick doesn't drop until 4:22 and by then you've been completely conditioned. Shackleton rewires your nervous system before he gives you the release.

⚡ 4:22▲ 312
S
@spectral_earUK Garage
♫Burial — Archangel

That vocal chop at 1:48 — it's not music, it's rain on a window at 3am. Nobody has made loneliness sound this precise before or since.

⚡ 1:48▲ 841
F
@frequency_witchAbstract
♫Actress — Hubble

The static at the beginning isn't intro — it's the texture. Everything that follows is the static becoming something. One of the most patient openings in electronic music.

⚡ 0:00▲ 229
See trending reviews →

How it works

Built for music obsessives

▲

Vertical feed

Scroll through reviews like a feed. Each card is a full-screen experience with the track playing behind it.

⚡

Cue timestamps

Reviewers pin the exact moment that hits hardest. Jump straight to the drop, the hook, the 32 bars that matter.

♫

SoundCloud native

Every review links directly to SoundCloud. One tap to listen. No rips, no re-uploads — the real thing.

👁

Taste graph

Follow reviewers whose ears you trust. Your feed shapes itself around the people, not the algorithm.

💬

Deep cuts only

No charts, no major labels. Subfreq is built for underground — techno, drum & bass, footwork, left-field everything.

🔗

Share a cue

Share a review with the timestamp embedded. Send someone exactly the moment you want them to hear.

Browse by genre

Every corner of the underground

ElectronicTechnoDrum & BassAmbientHip-HopFootworkJungleExperimental

Start exploring
the underground.

No algorithm. No major labels. Just reviews from people who actually care.

Open the feed →
